demo_name: Fred Hutch Data Engineering Session: Live Trials-Feed Ingestion

deploy_target.note: No bundle to deploy for this kit. Only the shared foundation deploys a DAB (foundation_setup_job), which creates the 6 read-only OMOP source tables and the live trials-feed Volume in the foundation schema (default clinops_foundation). The team builds the trials-feed ingest LIVE with Genie Code following GENIE_CODE_PROMPTS.md: Track 1 is a Spark Structured Streaming notebook scheduled as a Job, Track 2 is a Lakeflow Declarative Pipeline. The first prompt creates the team's own writable client_schema. Setup for this kit = confirm the foundation source and feed are up, then point Genie Code at the read-only source schema and a writable schema. There is no databricks.yml and no widget defaults to rewrite. The notebooks/ 00-05 are optional facilitator backup reference, not a deploy path.

toggle.note: The PRIMARY trials-feed build reads only the live feed Volume, which is a synthetic workshop simulator and is NEVER repointed. The synthetic-vs-real toggle applies to the 6 OMOP tables, which the team references for the join-ready proof and the optional backup notebooks: synthetic = your own catalog plus clinops_foundation; real = curated_omop.omop, a DIFFERENT catalog, so BOTH source_catalog and source_schema must be set. The 6 OMOP table names are identical either way. Because there is no databricks.yml, the switch is conveyed to Genie Code in the prompt (read FROM curated_omop.omop), not written to a bundle. IMPORTANT: the trials feed uses feed_schema (the foundation, default clinops_foundation), independent of source_schema, so repointing OMOP to real never breaks the feed.

widget_config.note: This kit is built live with Genie Code, so there are no widget defaults for the skill to rewrite during setup. The notebooks/_config.py widgets exist only for the optional facilitator backup notebooks and are set by hand if a facilitator opens them; adaptation does not touch them.

real_mode.how: There is no databricks.yml for this kit. To run against real OMOP, tell Genie Code to read the 6 OMOP tables FROM curated_omop.omop instead of the foundation schema (set both source_catalog=curated_omop and source_schema=omop in the prompt). The trials feed stays on the foundation; it is a workshop simulator, not real FH data.
real_mode.rebuild_assets: The trials-feed pipeline (bronze_trial_catalog, silver_trial_criteria, quarantine_trial_criteria) reads only the feed, so it is unaffected by the OMOP synthetic-to-real switch. Anything the team built that reads the 6 OMOP tables (the join-ready proof, or the backup OMOP notebooks) must be re-run after repointing so it reflects real OMOP.

tables.name: person
tables.role: Read-only OMOP source, one row per patient. Referenced for the join-ready proof; the primary trials-feed build does not ingest it.

tables.name: bronze_trial_catalog
tables.role: VARIANT bronze the TEAM lands via Auto Loader (cloudFiles) from the shared LIVE trials feed Volume. Schema-stable (raw line, trial_raw VARIANT, _source_file). Row count GROWS as the feed runs. Absorbs new criteria with no schema change.

tables.name: silver_trial_criteria
tables.role: Flattened, join-ready trial eligibility criteria (latest-wins per trial_id by load_ts, every field read null-safe via try_variant_get, including min_ecog). The eligibility contract the Applied AI pre-screen joins against.

tables.name: quarantine_trial_criteria
tables.role: Bad trial records routed aside with a quarantine_reason (malformed_json / missing_trial_id / invalid_type) so a malformed line never fails the load. Track 2 drops them via @dlt.expect_all_or_drop on the source view.

tables.name: recon_summary
tables.role: Optional hardening (Chetan #17): a per-file reconciliation audit the team may add (did every record reach silver or quarantine?).

tables.name: _ingest_state (volume)
tables.role: A Volume in client_schema holding Auto Loader's schemaLocation and checkpoint for the trials ingest (Track 1). Never in the shared read-only Volume.

source_files.primary: GENIE_CODE_PROMPTS.md (Track 1 Spark Structured Streaming notebook to Job, Track 2 Lakeflow Declarative Pipeline). This is the build path.
source_files.backup_notebooks: notebooks/ (00_START_HERE, 01_schema_evolution, 02_row_count_reconciliation, 03_restricted_table_ingest_gate, 04_sla_job_windows, 05_trials_catalog_ingest): optional worked reference for the facilitator, not the path.
source_files.backup_config: notebooks/_config.py (widgets for the backup notebooks only)

bronze.note: VARIANT bronze landed by the Auto Loader ingest into client_schema from the live trials feed.

silver.note: This DE track ingests the shared LIVE trials feed (foundation land_trial_feed) incrementally into bronze_trial_catalog, flattens the good records to silver_trial_criteria (the eligibility contract the Applied AI pre-screen joins against), and quarantines bad records to quarantine_trial_criteria. Both groups build in parallel off the shared foundation; neither waits on the other's data layer. See ../../SHARED_FOUNDATION.md.

dependency_map.note: Auto Loader reads the shared LIVE feed Volume (feed_schema on the foundation) and appends to bronze in client_schema, checkpointed per-team
good records only, latest-wins per trial_id by load_ts
bad records with a quarantine_reason (Track 2 via expectations on the source view)
The trials catalog silver_trial_criteria is the eligibility contract the Applied AI pre-screen joins against (a hand-off, never a blocker)

grain_constraints.note: One latest-wins row per trial_id, newest by load_ts

source_inputs.description: The PRIMARY source: the shared LIVE clinical-trials feed, streamed by the foundation land_trial_feed simulator. The team ingests it incrementally with Auto Loader (cloudFiles). Read-only shared producer; each team checkpoints in its own schema. feed_schema is the foundation schema (default clinops_foundation) and is INDEPENDENT of source_schema; it stays on the foundation even when OMOP is repointed to real.
source_inputs.active_when: always; the presenter starts, stages, and stops the feed via the foundation job

source_inputs.description: The 6 read-only OMOP source tables (foundation). Referenced for the join-ready proof and the optional backup notebooks; the primary trials-feed build does not ingest them. Synthetic default = clinops_foundation.
FH real OMOP CDM tables. Point source_catalog and source_schema here to reference real data. Identical table names.

verify_queries.description: Checkpoint 0: all 6 read-only OMOP source tables present with expected counts (the feed Volume presence is confirmed separately by listing it)
verify_queries.sql: SELECT 'person' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.person UNION ALL SELECT 'condition_occurrence', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.condition_occurrence UNION ALL SELECT 'measurement', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.measurement UNION ALL SELECT 'observation', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.observation UNION ALL SELECT 'drug_exposure', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.drug_exposure UNION ALL SELECT 'note', COUNT(*) FROM ${client_catalog}.${source_schema}.note ORDER BY tbl
verify_queries.expected: person=300, condition_occurrence=300, measurement=720, observation=720, drug_exposure=383, note=265

verify_queries.description: Checkpoint 1: clean trials flowed to silver, latest-wins, with min_ecog present. Counts grow as the live feed runs; the point is clean trials are present and deduped.
verify_queries.sql: SELECT trial_id, min_ecog, feed_version FROM ${client_catalog}.${client_schema}.silver_trial_criteria ORDER BY trial_id
verify_queries.expected: one row per trial_id (A/B/C at minimum, then D/E/F as they land); Trial A min_ecog=1, others NULL until they set it

verify_queries.description: Checkpoint 2: bad records were routed aside with a reason, not allowed to fail the load. Appears after the dirty stage is released.
verify_queries.sql: SELECT quarantine_reason, COUNT(*) AS n FROM ${client_catalog}.${client_schema}.quarantine_trial_criteria GROUP BY quarantine_reason ORDER BY quarantine_reason

lock_targets.reason: The backup notebooks read the trials LANDING Volume via feed_schema: /Volumes/<catalog>/<feed_schema>/trial_landing/trial_catalog. Keep it on feed_schema (the foundation); never repoint it at client_schema (the feed is a shared producer) and never tie it to source_schema (repointing OMOP to real must not break the feed). Auto Loader schemaLocation and checkpoint MUST stay in client_schema (_ingest_state Volume). These are backup-reference notebooks; the live build is via GENIE_CODE_PROMPTS.md.

OMOP CDM source table names (person, condition_occurrence, measurement, observation, drug_exposure, note) are standard. Renaming breaks the read from source_schema and the synthetic-to-real repointing. Backup notebooks.
Adaptation skill must not modify itself

checkpoints_note: The DE build is validated as the trials-feed pipeline in either framework (Track 1 SSS notebook to Job, Track 2 LDP). Checkpoints 0 to 3 are documented in RUNBOOK.md. The optional backup notebooks (01-04) carry their own OMOP-table checkpoints if a facilitator opens them.
